Our Story

Crafting Beauty
Since 2012

GRD Cosmetics Industries was established in 2012 in Bawana, New Delhi — India's vibrant cosmetics manufacturing belt. We specialise in manufacturing, wholesaling and trading a wide range of beauty products under our beloved For Sure brand.

Every product we make is formulated to be skin-friendly, safe, and effective — with no harmful side effects. From dazzling lipsticks in a spectrum of shades to long-lasting kajal, glossy nail polishes and nourishing facial kits, we deliver quality beauty at accessible prices.

💋
For Sure — Our Signature Brand Lip make-up · Eye products · Nail care · Skincare kits

Why Choose Us

Quality You Can Wear With Pride

🧪

Skin-Friendly Formula

Every product is formulated to be safe and gentle — no harmful chemicals, no side effects. Beauty that cares for you.

🏭

Direct Manufacturer

Buy directly from the source. 10+ years of manufacturing excellence in Bawana Industrial Area, New Delhi.

💰

Wholesale Pricing

Competitive factory-direct prices starting as low as ₹6/piece. Ideal for retailers, beauty shops & distributors.

📦

Bulk & Custom Orders

We cater to bulk orders and can accommodate custom packaging requirements to suit your business needs.

✅

GST Verified

Fully GST-registered business (07AAKFG1121C1Z2). Transparent, compliant, and trustworthy transactions always.
